title: Auto Third Person
description: Auto Third Person is a mod that automatically switches your camera to third person view when riding animals and vehicles or using Elytra.
body:
**Auto Third Person** is a Fabric mod that automatically switches your camera to third person view when riding animals and vehicles or using elytra.

![auto third person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08bd145fe8f05e28197ca676e06b4c80075de33_0.webp)

The mod intelligently detects when you mount boats, horses, camels, or start gliding with elytra, providing a better viewing experience during these activities. 

When you dismount or land, the camera smoothly returns to your previous perspective setting.
